summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ArbitrajZ Stripe payment integration. All 8 required test flows verified successfully: user registration, login, pricing page display, Stripe checkout redirect (both authenticated and unauthenticated scenarios), payment status polling, and PaymentSuccess page states.

issues: Premium plan button shows 'Current Plan' for admin user since admin has premium tier by default - this is expected behavior

action_items: Consider adding data-testid attributes to key UI elements (login form, register form, pricing buttons) for better automated testing
Consider adding data-testid to PaymentSuccess page status indicators

test_credentials.test_users_created: Multiple TEST_ prefixed users created during pytest

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-creates admin user on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Stripe payment flows tested and working. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_stripe_auth.py cover: health check, auth (register/login), payment checkout (all 3 plans), payment status polling. Frontend flows verified: landing page, registration, login, pricing page (3 plans displayed correctly), authenticated checkout redirects to Stripe, unauthenticated checkout redirects to login, PaymentSuccess page shows correct states (error for no session, processing for valid session).
mocked_apis_note: Crypto prices and arbitrage opportunities are MOCKED in backend/server.py as specified

tests_verified.user_registration_flow: PASS - Creates new user and redirects to dashboard
tests_verified.user_login_flow: PASS - Login with credentials redirects to dashboard
tests_verified.pricing_page_3_plans: PASS - Test ($1/day, 2 exchanges), Pro ($29/month, 5 exchanges, MOST POPULAR), Premium ($99/month, Unlimited)
tests_verified.get_started_authenticated_stripe_redirec: PASS - Redirects to Stripe checkout page (https://checkout.stripe.com/...)
tests_verified.checkout_api_endpoint: PASS - /api/payments/checkout creates valid Stripe session with session_id and url
tests_verified.unauthenticated_get_started_login_redire: PASS - Redirects to /login when not authenticated
tests_verified.payment_success_page: PASS - Shows processing state with polling, error state for invalid session
